stemHtml: What are some of the ways to manage long term, chronic stress?

options.a: Health and fitness programmes, social interactions, professional help, task and workload management (both work and non-work related).
options.b: Remove the stressor, drink alcohol, ignore the stressor.
options.c: Health and fitness programmes, social interactions, professional help, religious practices, taking anti-depressants.
options.d: Take drugs, drink tea or coffee, keep the problems bottled up.
